name: Yan Lo
title: The Spirit Walker

abilities.name: Hand of the Ancestors
abilities.text: After an ally within 8" of this model discards a Reliquary upgrade, that ally may gain a Shielded token.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (magic) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Lingering Voice
abilities.text: This model may draw range and LoS for (magic) actions from allies with attached Reliquary upgrades within 8".

actions.name: Storm of Ash
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, the target must discard a random card.

triggers.name: Cinder Storm
triggers.text: The target gains an Aura (Fire) token.

actions.name: Harsh Teaching
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. Target declares an action, chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Ancestral Curse
triggers.text: The target gains an Adversary token.

actions.name: Lessons of History
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Look at the top five cards of this model's fate deck and discard any number of non-joker cards, placing the rest back in any order.

triggers.name: Ancient Anchor
triggers.text: Place this model in base contact with an ally within 8".

triggers.name: Guard Reliquary
triggers.text: An ally within 8" of this model gains a Greedy token.

actions.name: Spiritual Guide
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Move the target up to 3", then attach a Reliquary upgrade to the target.

triggers.name: Provoked
triggers.text: Target declares the Charge action, ignoring engagement.

extraction_notes: Keywords section shows 'Yin, the Penangalan' in italics which appears to be a totem reference, but formatted differently than typical Master card totem displays
